title: Hāra Gebeya Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Hāra Gebeya with a Z-Score of +3.86. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Hāra Gebeya is at a critical level, with a CDD of 12.5 GG and extremely low humidity at 18%. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 17.3 km/h, offering little relief from the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD and low humidity suggest significant heat stress.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately
